title: Coyn Shipyards
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Coyn Shipyards''' was a small shipwright on [[Coyn]]. It supplied the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] with a number of customized ships, including the ''[[Neverquit]]'' for the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Grea]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
